title: Golden Dandelion Totem
description: This Pack changes the texture of the "Totem of Undying"  to the Golden Dandelion
body:
# Golden Dandelion Totem – Nature’s Protection
This resource pack is designed for players who want to replace the bulky, traditional Totem of Undying with a more aesthetic and natural design. It transforms the standard totem into a delicate, shimmering Golden Dandelion.


## Features
Custom Dandelion Texture: Replaces the humanoid gold statue with a vibrant, hand-crafted Golden Dandelion.

Improved Visibility: The slim profile of the flower ensures you have a better field of view when holding it in your off-hand.

Vibrant Glow: Optimized colors to ensure the totem remains visible and "golden" even in low-light environments.

## Compatibility
Although the pack is technically set to a specific format, it is fully functional across a wide range of Minecraft versions. If the game shows a "Made for an older/newer version" warning, you can safely ignore it—the textures will still load perfectly.

Confirmed Working Versions:

1.21.x

1.20.x

1.19.x

1.18.x

1.17.x
